title: Rock Paper Scissor Mind Game
tagline: ML-driven adaptive game with online learning
description: An intelligent game that learns and adapts to player patterns in real-time using TensorFlow/Keras
impact: Launched publicly and reached 1,000+ unique visitors
Combined deep learning with behavioral frequency heuristics and streak detection
Deployed production-ready FastAPI backend accessible via Vercel
Implemented Docker Compose for reproducible environments

title: Spotify Music Recommendation App
description: Full-stack web app that generates personalized Spotify recommendations with explanations
impact: Accepts Spotify track or playlist URLs and generates personalized recommendations
Architected full-stack solution with FastAPI backend
Leverages audio feature extraction (librosa) and vector similarity search (FAISS)
Provides explanation for each recommendation

title: AAOC Planner
tagline: Average Age of Credit Calculator & Financial Planning Tool
description: Comprehensive financial planning tool that automates credit management workflows
impact: Automates Average Age of Credit calculations
Engineered object-oriented architecture with modular classes
Enables extensible functionality and maintainable codebase
Streamlines credit management workflows

title: FreeCodeCamp Daily Challenge Solutions
tagline: Daily coding challenge solutions with detailed explanations
description: Repository of daily FreeCodeCamp challenge solutions with approach explanations
impact: Consistent daily problem-solving practice
Documented thought process and approach for each challenge
Demonstrates algorithmic thinking and code clarity
Growing collection of solutions across multiple months

title: Portfolio Website
